user.title: Add a PiPup TV
user.description: Enter the address of the Android TV running PiPup. The token is only needed if you have enabled authentication on the device.

zeroconf_confirm.title: Add a PiPup TV
zeroconf_confirm.description: A PiPup TV was discovered at {host}. Add it to Home Assistant? Enter a token only if authentication is enabled on the device.

error.cannot_connect: Could not reach PiPup at that address.

abort.already_configured: This PiPup TV is already configured.

send.name: Send notification
send.description: Show a rich pop-up notification on a PiPup TV.

id.name: ID
id.description: Stable popup id. Re-sending with the same id updates the popup in place (a live stream keeps playing); also what Cancel targets.

position.name: Position
position.description: Where on screen the notification appears.

tts.name: Text-to-speech
tts.description: Text to speak aloud on the TV.

sound.name: Sound
sound.description: URI of a sound to play.

image_uri.name: Image URL
image_uri.description: Image to show (URL or base64 data URI). Animated GIFs animate.

video_uri.name: Video / stream URL
video_uri.description: Video file or live HLS/RTSP stream to play.

media_width.name: Media width
media_width.description: Width of the media in pixels.

web_height.name: Web height
web_height.description: Height of an embedded web page in pixels.

border_width.name: Border width
border_width.description: Border thickness in px (requires a border color).

urgency.name: Urgency
urgency.description: info / warning / critical — a blue / orange / red border preset.

muted.name: Muted
muted.description: Play video/web media without audio, so the popup never grabs audio focus.

buttons.name: Buttons
buttons.description: Up to 3 remote-operable buttons, each with an id and a label. Pressing one fires a pipup_button event and dismisses the popup.

button_text_color.name: Button text color
button_text_color.description: Button label color, [AA]RRGGBB; auto-contrasts when omitted.

icon_uri.name: Icon URI
icon_uri.description: Small leading icon (URL or base64 data URI).

show_progress.name: Show progress bar
show_progress.description: Show a countdown bar that drains over the duration.

replace.name: Replace
replace.description: Clear other pop-ups first instead of stacking.

callback.name: Callback URL
callback.description: URL that receives shown/dismissed/button POSTs. Leave empty when using buttons — Home Assistant wires this up and fires a pipup_button event.

media_position.name: Media position
media_position.description: Where media sits relative to the text: top, bottom, left, or right.

title_alignment.name: Title alignment
title_alignment.description: Align the title left, center, or right.

message_alignment.name: Message alignment
message_alignment.description: Align the message left, center, or right.

animation_type.name: Animation
animation_type.description: Entrance/exit animation: none, fade, slide, or scale.

animation_exit.name: Animate on exit
animation_exit.description: Also play the animation when the notification is dismissed.
